world_news.headline: Former FBI director James Comey charged with threatening Trump's life
world_news.summary: The indictment stems from a 2025 photo of seashells posted by Comey on social media that the justice department says is a call to violence against Trump.

world_news.headline: News live: King Charles praises ‘ambitious’ Aukus and expresses pride in Australia in speech to US Congress
world_news.summary:
Nuclear submarine mentioned in part of king’s speech that emphasised defence ties. Follow today’s news live

  • Get our breaking news email, free app or daily news podcast

The federal government has pledged new funding to help the states and territories strike agreements that would allow them to assess and approve projects themselves under new federal nature laws.

Anthony Albanese will make the four-year, $45m announcement in a speech to a mining industry event in Western Australia, describing the deals as a “circuit-breaker” that will fast-track mining, energy and housing applications.

world_news.headline: Stoinis goes big but Royals dent crown of Ponting's Kings
world_news.summary: Ricky Ponting's Punjab Kings record a six-wicket loss against Rajasthan Royals in the IPL, despite Marcus Stoinis's breathtaking innings.

world_news.headline: Trump hails US-UK bond as he welcomes British royals
world_news.summary: US President Donald Trump hailed the "cherished bond" between the United States and the United Kingdom.

world_news.headline: Northern Ireland makes arrest linked to suspected New IRA car bombing
world_news.summary: The nationalist group has been escalating threats, nearly 30 years after a peace deal largely ended sectarian violence.

world_news.headline: Congress cheers King Charles for underlining ‘checks and balances’
world_news.summary: US lawmakers gave King Charles III a standing ovation upon mentioning the importance of “checks and balances”.

world_news.headline: Nearly eight million people in South Sudan at risk of acute hunger: NGOs
world_news.summary: Aid agencies warn that time is running out to avoid an 'irreversible humanitarian catastrophe'.

world_news.headline: Trump scolds Germany’s Merz for criticism of Iran war
world_news.summary: US president says German chancellor 'doesn't know what he's talking about', defends war on Iran as necessary.

world_news.headline: US regulator to review Disney broadcast licences after Jimmy Kimmel joke about Melania Trump
world_news.summary: The move comes as the White House pressures Disney-owned ABC to fire Kimmel after he called Melania an "expectant widow".

world_news.headline: Musk says basis of charitable giving at stake in OpenAI lawsuit
world_news.summary: The case over OpenAI's history and public commitments could have major implications for the future of AI.
